creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
I assume that this is the build of the current version 3.67.0? And that the error is triggered by using a current clang version 19.x.x under CURRENT? Apparently this filezilla version does not work with the current clang19.

I have tried the update for filezilla in bug #283373 and bug #283374 under CURRENT with clang19 and it builds, installs and works fine. 

The remaining problem in the mentioned update is that the fetch of the distfiles does not work so far. Alternatively, you can download them manually [1][2] and store them under /usr/ports/distfiles.


[1] https://lib.filezilla-project.org/download.php
[2] https://filezilla-project.org/download.php?show_all=1
